steps.title: Locate the minimum
steps.content: Both functions use the base $1.3$, which is greater than $1$, so each function increases as $x$ increases. With $x\ge0$, each minimum occurs at $x=0$.

steps.title: Check each equation
steps.content:
Evaluate both functions at $x=0$.
$$g(0)=20(1.12)(1.3)^3$$
$$h(0)=20(1.3)^5$$
Neither minimum value is displayed as a single constant or coefficient in its original equation.

steps.title: Choose neither
steps.content: Since neither I nor II displays its minimum value as a constant or coefficient, the correct choice is neither I nor II. The answer is D.
